summary: Session 1 audit pass scope-locked the Set 046 stub into a 7-session arc. Two-pass devil's-advocate cross-provider consensus over the audit proposal (gemini-2.5-pro primary + gpt-5-4-mini verify, $0.183/$5 NTE) resolved five bias flags (3 stand-by, 1 flip — migrator gets its own session, 1 partial) and four open questions; added a state-divergence pill as a new leverage point from Pass A primary. Operator-locked deliverables (a) 0/? fraction, (b) second-line engine-model-effort badge, (c) README screenshot are mapped onto S2/S3/S7 with the canonical-primary / harvested-fallback data-source rule applied across S3/S4/S5. The v4 schema migration and blocked-on-prereqs lifecycle question are deferred to a new stub at 047-state-file-schema-v4-audit per the audit-then-spec discipline for substantial schema changes.

reason.specifics: Session 2 implements the writer-side totalSessions:null change designed in Session 1's audit, plus Explorer pre-flight verification of deliverable (a). Same orchestrator preserves continuity of the canonical-primary / harvested-fallback architectural framing established by the audit.
